    txt=pytesseract.image_to_string(crop, config='--psm 6')

import cv2, pytesseract, re, math
from PIL import Image, ImageOps, ImageFilter

cap=cv2.VideoCapture('/app/zork.mp4')
fps=cap.get(cv2.CAP_PROP_FPS)
entries=[]
for i in range(0, int(cap.get(cv2.CAP_PROP_FRAME_COUNT)), 3):  # every 0.1s
    cap.set(cv2.CAP_PROP_POS_FRAMES, i)
    ok, frame=cap.read()
    if not ok: break
    img=Image.fromarray(cv2.cvtColor(frame, cv2.COLOR_BGR2RGB)).convert('L')
    w,h=img.size
    top=img.crop((0,0,w,28)).resize((w*4,28*4), Image.Resampling.NEAREST)
    top=ImageOps.autocontrast(top).point(lambda p: 255 if p>140 else 0)
    top_txt=pytesseract.image_to_string(top, config='--psm 7 -c tessedit_char_whitelist=ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789: ')
    m=re.search(r'Moves:?\s*(\d+)', top_txt, re.I)
    moves=int(m.group(1)) if m else None
    bottom=img.crop((0,h-40,w,h)).resize((w*4,40*4), Image.Resampling.NEAREST)
    bottom=ImageOps.autocontrast(bottom).point(lambda p: 255 if p>120 else 0)
    txt=pytesseract.image_to_string(bottom, config='--psm 7 -c tessedit_char_whitelist=>abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0123456789,.;!?_ ') 
    txt=txt.strip().replace('|','l')
    if '>' in txt:
        # keep from last >
        txt='>'+txt.split('>')[-1]
    else:
        txt=''
    if moves is not None and txt:
        entries.append((i/fps, moves, txt))

# dedupe near-identical adjacent
last=None
for t,m,txt in entries[:300]:
    if last and last[1]==m and last[2]==txt: continue
    print(f'{t:6.2f} m{m:3} {txt}')
    last=(t,m,txt)
